heading: Question S1Q1
text:
State the universal law of
gravitation.

heading: Question S1Q2
text:
Write the formula to find the
magnitude of the gravitational
force between the earth and an
object on the surface of the earth.
The universal law of gravitation successfully
explained several phenomena which were
believed to be unconnected:

heading: Question S2Q1
text: What do you mean by free fall?

heading: Question S2Q2
text:
What do you mean by acceleration
due to gravity?

heading: Question S3Q1
text:
What are the differences between
the mass of an object and its
weight?

heading: Question S3Q2
text:
Why is the weight of an object on
the moon th its weight on the
earth?

heading: Question S4Q1
text:
Why is it difficult to hold a school
bag having a strap made of a thin
and strong string?

heading: Question S4Q2
text: What do you mean by buoyancy?

heading: Question S4Q3
text:
Why does an object float or sink
when placed on the surface of
water?

heading: Question S5Q1
text:
You find your mass to be 42 kg
on a weighing machine. Is your
mass more or less than 42 kg?
